details.test: Task 1: Book morning Family Llama Farm Tour under $100 with picnic
Task 2: Add 3 medium llama wool socks under $25 to cart
Task 3: Llama birthday party inquiry for 10 kids in June
Task 4: Use weekend itinerary (tour + walk + fiber) and add to cart
Task 5: Purchase $75 llama-themed digital gift card with scheduled delivery
Task 6: Register 1 attendee for fiber workshop under $60 with LLAMA10
Task 7: Book 2-night Llama View Cabin + breakfast under $300
Task 8: School field trip request for 25 students in October weekday
